data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Messages on WhatsApp are secured using end-to-end encryption.
data.technical_spec: Encryption protocols ensuring only communicating users can read messages.

data.title: Two-Step Verification
data.description: WhatsApp offers two-step verification for enhanced account security.
data.technical_spec: User-enabled feature requiring a PIN for account verification.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent security audits to identify and resolve potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Engages in both internal and external audits in coordination with cybersecurity experts.

data.title: Automatic Security Updates
data.description: WhatsApp regularly updates its application to protect against emerging threats.
data.technical_spec: Pushes security patches without user intervention.

data.title: Spam Detection
data.description: Uses algorithms to detect and prevent spam across its platform.
data.technical_spec: Automated systems monitoring message patterns and frequency.
